name: Pokerus-TF
description:
It was well known that humans were always striving to find new ways to improve their lives and the world around them. Be that through technology, adaptation or mimicry of nature.

It was also well known that humans had a tendency to mess with things they really shouldn't touch.

It was doubly well known that many outbreaks were due to human error.

This bot is an expanded version of another bot I saw on here and decided to try my hand at making. (The bot in question: Pokerus TF )

Basically, humans decided to poke something they didn't fully understand and boom! Mass outbreak and the possible end of the human race. But is that really a bad thing if all the humans become Pokémon...? Guess that'd be up to you to decide. You gonna get yourself infected? Gonna be the one to make a cure? Or maybe you're already a Pokémon purposefully going around infecting humans. Who knows?

Needless to say, this is my first bot, so feedback and suggestions on how to improve this bot are appreciated.

(Update 1.0 on 12/28/25 - Updated the personality to make it more clear how infection can spread via humans and Pokémon.)
creator: Zarkaros
